rules.rule_text:
rule KeyBoy_Backdoor
{
	meta:
		author = "Rapid7 Labs"
		reference = "https://community.rapid7.com/community/infosec/blog/2013/06/07/keyboy-targeted-attacks-against-vietnam-and-india"

	strings:
		$1 = "$login$"
		$2 = "$sysinfo$"
		$3 = "$shell$"
		$4 = "$fileManager$"
		$5 = "$fileDownload$"
		$6 = "$fileUpload$"

	condition:
		all of them
}
